base.name: Col. Jack O'Neill
base.ability: Clone gambit: Summon a temporary Jack clone each round. Draw +1 card at round start
base.ability_desc: At the start of every round summon a 6-power Jack clone that survives exactly 3 of your turns (removed when the 4th would begin)

base.name: Gen. George Hammond
base.ability: Your first unit each round gets +3 power
base.ability_desc: Your first unit played each round gets +3 power

unlockable.name: Gen. Landry
unlockable.ability: Homeworld Command: Units get +1 in row with most units
unlockable.ability_desc: All units in your most populated row get +1 power

unlockable.name: Dr. McKay
unlockable.ability: Draw 2 cards when you pass
unlockable.ability_desc: Draw 2 cards when you pass your turn

unlockable.name: Jonas Quinn
unlockable.ability: Eidetic Memory: Copy a card opponent drew
unlockable.ability_desc: Once per game: Look at cards opponent drew, copy one to your hand

unlockable.name: Catherine Langford
unlockable.ability: Ancient Knowledge: Look at top 3 cards of your deck, play one immediately
unlockable.ability_desc: Once per game: Reveal top 3 cards, choose one to play, rest go to bottom of deck

base.name: Apophis
base.ability: Once per game, unleash a random weather storm
base.ability_desc: Activate a random battlefield weather that hits both sides once per game

base.name: Lord Yu
base.ability: See opponent's hand next round when you pass
base.ability_desc: When you pass, the opponent's entire next-round hand is revealed until the round ends

base.name: Sokar
base.ability: +1 power to all Close Combat units
base.ability_desc: +1 power to all Close Combat units

unlockable.name: Ba'al

unlockable.ability_desc: Once per game: Return a destroyed unit from discard pile to your hand

unlockable.name: Hathor

unlockable.ability_desc: Units get +1 in round 1, +2 in round 2, +3 in round 3

base.name: Teal'c
base.ability: Draw 1 card when winning a round
base.ability_desc: Draw 1 card when winning a round

base.ability_desc: Can play 2 cards on your first turn of each round

unlockable.ability_desc: Automatically draw 2 extra cards when round 3 begins

base.name: Varro
base.ability_desc: Deep Cover Agents draw 3 cards instead of 2

base.ability_desc: +3 power to your highest unit in each row
